task_completion.description: Navigate to the import or user waypoints section in Avare
task_completion.visual_evidence: Avare app screen showing options for User Waypoints, Lists, or an Import menu.
A file picker dialog or screen within Avare showing 'company_lz.gpx' being selected from the device storage (e.g., /sdcard/).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the search function in Avare
task_completion.visual_evidence: Avare app's Search screen or search bar is visible and active.

task_completion.description: Enter the target waypoint name into the search bar
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'LZ_ALPHA' is typed into the search input field in Avare.

task_completion.description: Verify the target waypoint appears in the search results
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'LZ_ALPHA' is clearly visible in the populated search results below the search bar, indicating the import was successful.

integrity.description: The agent used the Avare graphical user interface to perform the import and search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI interactions (taps, file picker, app navigation) within Avare, rather than terminal commands or database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent imported the GPX file rather than manually creating the waypoint.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the selection of the 'company_lz.gpx' file, not a manual 'Create Waypoint' or 'Edit Waypoint' screen where coordinates are typed by hand.

integrity.description: The final search result is displayed genuinely inside the Avare app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search results showing 'LZ_ALPHA' are displayed within the standard Avare app UI, not in a text editor, browser, or spoofed image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target GPX file is located at '/sdcard/company_lz.gpx'. The target waypoint to search for is 'LZ_ALPHA' (approximate coordinates: 37.615, -122.39). The VLM should verify that 'company_lz.gpx' is selected during the import process and that 'LZ_ALPHA' successfully appears in Avare's search results.
